info.title: Ex Libris APIs
info.description: For more information on how to use these APIs, including how to create an API key required for authentication, see [Alma REST APIs](https://developers.exlibrisgroup.com/alma/apis).

externalDocs.description: Detailed documentation on these APIs at the Ex Libris Developer Network.

get.description: This API returns a list of Currencies or a Currency and Exchange Rate.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Limits the number of results. Optional. Valid values are 0-100. Default value: 10.

parameters.name: offset
parameters.description: Offset of the results returned. Optional. Default value: 0, which means that the first results will be returned.

parameters.name: mode
parameters.description: The mode for currency display. May be ALL, Subset or Ratio. ALL by default.

parameters.name: source_currency
parameters.description: Source currency ID. Applies only to Ratio mode and is optional.

parameters.name: target_currency
parameters.description: Target currency ID. Applies only to Ratio mode and is optional.

parameters.name: exchange_date
parameters.description: The exchange date. Applies only to Ratio mode and is required. Format YYYYMMDD

200.description: OK - This method returns an object based on rest_currencies.xsd. See [here](/alma/apis/docs/xsd/rest_currencies.xsd)

400.description:
Bad Request

40166410 - 'A currency parameter is not valid.'

401666 - 'A parameter is not valid.'

60348 - 'The exchange rate cannot be determined.'

get.description:
This API returns a list of Fiscal Periods.

For retrieving the fiscal periods which are used for the GET Funds filtering.

parameters.name: mode
parameters.description: The mode for fiscal period display. May be ALL or Current. ALL by default.

200.description: OK - This method returns an object based on rest_fiscal_periods.xsd. See [here](/alma/apis/docs/xsd/rest_fiscal_periods.xsd)

400.description:
Bad Request

401873 - 'There is no current fiscal period.'

401666 - 'The mode parameter is not valid.'

get.description:
This API returns a list of Funds.

The list includes the relevant allocated funds that are active in the current date (based on the related fiscal period). This is the same list as retrieved in the UI when adding fund for a PO-Line.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Limits the number of results. Optional. Valid values are 0-100. Default value: 10.

parameters.name: offset
parameters.description: Offset of the results returned. Optional. Default value: 0, which means that the first results will be returned.

parameters.name: q
parameters.description: Search query. Optional. If the mode parameter is POL, then searching is limited to fund_code. Otherwise, available search options: all, fund_code, description, external_id, name. For example: q=fund_code~FU1 (see [Brief Search](https://developers.exlibrisgroup.com/blog/How-we-re-building-APIs-at-Ex-Libris#BriefSearch))

parameters.name: library
parameters.description: Filter by library or institution code that the fund is available for. All by default.

parameters.name: view
parameters.description: The view format, possible values: full / brief (used for vendors). Default is full

parameters.name: mode
parameters.description: POL - ready to be used for a PO-Line, allocated and active in the current fiscal period. ALL - all funds and ledgers.

parameters.name: status
parameters.description: Filter by status: ACTIVE/INACTIVE. All by default.

parameters.name: entity_type
parameters.description: Filter by fund entity type: LEDGER/SUMMARY/ALLOCATED. All by default.

parameters.name: fiscal_period
parameters.description: Filter by fiscal period.  Note: this should be the ID and not the description.  All by default.

parameters.name: parent_id
parameters.description: Filter for funds by the ID of their parent (which can be a ledger or a summary fund). All by default.

parameters.name: owner
parameters.description: Filter by the fund owner: library or the institution code. All by default.

200.description: OK - This method returns an object based on rest_funds.xsd. See [here](/alma/apis/docs/xsd/rest_funds.xsd)

400.description:
Bad Request

402119 - 'General error.'

40166410 - 'Parameter invalid with valid options.'

40166419 - 'Parameter has no valid options.'

401873 - 'Filter not supported when mode=POL.'

parameters.name: rules_level
parameters.description: This parameter will be used to indicate whether rules are defined in parent or fund. Default: fund

requestBody.description: This method creates a Fund object. See [here](/alma/apis/docs/xsd/rest_fund.xsd?tags=POST)

200.description: OK - This method returns an object based on rest_fund.xsd. See [here](/alma/apis/docs/xsd/rest_fund.xsd)

400.description:
Bad Request

410873 - 'Request Failed. See error message for details.'

40166410 - 'Parameter invalid with valid options.'

40166404 - 'Invalid field with valid options.'

get.description: This API returns a list of Fund Transactions.

parameters.name: fund_id
parameters.description: The fund identifier.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Limits the number of results. Optional. Valid values are 0-100. Default value: 10.

parameters.name: offset
parameters.description: Offset of the results returned. Optional. Default value: 0, which means that the first results will be returned.

parameters.name: q
parameters.description: Search query. Optional.  Available search options: amount, po_line, invoice_number, borrowing_request_id. For example: q=amount=25 (see [Brief Search](https://developers.exlibrisgroup.com/blog/How-we-re-building-APIs-at-Ex-Libris#BriefSearch))

parameters.name: filter
parameters.description: Filter by ALLOCATION, EXPENDITURE, ENCUMBRANCE, DISENCUMBRANCE, TRANSFER. All by default.

200.description: OK - This method returns an object based on rest_fund_transactions.xsd. See [here](/alma/apis/docs/xsd/rest_fund_transactions.xsd)

400.description:
Bad Request

402119 - 'General error.'

40166410 - 'Parameter invalid with valid options.'

401873 - 'The fund identifier is not valid.'

40166404 - 'The filter parameter is not valid.'

60106 - 'The query parameter is not valid.'

post.description: This API creates Allocation or Transfer Transactions.

parameters.name: fund_id
parameters.description: The fund identifier.

requestBody.description: This method takes an Transaction object. See [here](/alma/apis/docs/xsd/rest_fund_transaction.xsd?tags=POST)

200.description: OK - This method returns an object based on rest_fund_transaction.xsd. See [here](/alma/apis/docs/xsd/rest_fund_transaction.xsd)

400.description:
Bad Request

4018841 - 'Missing mandatory field 'type'.'

4018842 - 'Transaction type is not supported.'

4018843 - 'Missing mandatory field 'amount'.'

4018845 - 'Missing mandatory field 'related_fund'.'

4018846 - 'Fund id in 'related_fund' field is not valid.'

4018847 - 'Selected fund id in 'related_fund' field has a different fiscal period.'

4018848 - 'Selected fund id in 'related_fund' field is inactive.'

4018850 - 'Fund code not valid.'

4018851 - 'Selected Fund code is a ledger / summary fund, transaction could not be created.'

parameters.name: fund_id
parameters.description: The fund identifier.

400.description:
Bad Request

410873 - 'Request Failed. See error message for details.'

40166410 - 'Parameter invalid with valid options.'

40166404 - 'Invalid field with valid options.'

200.description: OK - This method returns an object based on rest_fund.xsd. See [here](/alma/apis/docs/xsd/rest_fund.xsd)

200.description: OK - This method returns an object based on rest_fund.xsd. See [here](/alma/apis/docs/xsd/rest_fund.xsd)

400.description:
Bad Request

40166410 - 'Parameter invalid with valid options.'

40166404 - 'Invalid field with valid options.'

parameters.name: fund_id
parameters.description: The fund identifier.

parameters.name: rules_level
parameters.description: This parameter will be used to indicate whether rules are defined in parent or fund. Default: fund

requestBody.description: This method creates a Fund object. See [here](/alma/apis/docs/xsd/rest_fund.xsd?tags=PUT)

200.description: OK - This method returns an object based on rest_fund.xsd. See [here](/alma/apis/docs/xsd/rest_fund.xsd)

400.description:

post.description: This API creates an invoice. See blog: [Creating an invoice using APIs](https://developers.exlibrisgroup.com/blog/Creating-an-invoice-using-APIs).

Bad Request

402119 - 'General error.'

60233 - 'Invoice number not in payload.'

60288 - 'Invoice number not unique in payload.'

60234 - 'Invoice date not in payload.'

60235 - 'Invoice total amount not in payload.'

60236 - 'Invoice currency not valid.'

60237 - 'Invoice vendor account not valid.'

60238 - 'Invoice payment method not valid.'

60239 - 'Invoice status not valid.'

60240 - 'Invoice prepaid not valid.'

60241 - 'Invoice explicit ratio not valid.'

60242 - 'Invoice vendor not material supplier.'

60243 - 'Invoice vendor currency not supported.'

60244 - 'Invoice explicit ratio duplicate currency.'

60245 - 'Invoice payment status not valid.'

60246 - 'Invoice owner not valid.'

60252 - 'Invoice vat percentage or amount allowed but not both.'

60253 - 'Invoice vat code not valid.'

4028805 - 'Invoice vendor not in payload.'

60256 - 'Invoice not created.'

get.description: This API returns a list of  Invoices.

parameters.name: q
parameters.description: Search query. Optional. Searched fields: invoice_number, vendor_code, additional_pol_reference, invoice_reference_number, pol_number, pol_title, po_number, vendor_name, all. Note that some combinations of search fields cannot be used together. (see [Brief Search](https://developers.exlibrisgroup.com/blog/How-we-re-building-APIs-at-Ex-Libris#BriefSearch))

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Limits the number of results. Optional. Valid values are 0-100. Default value: 10.

parameters.name: offset
parameters.description: Offset of the results returned. Optional. Default value: 0, which means that the first results will be returned.

parameters.name: view
parameters.description: Invoice view. If view=brief, invoices will be returned without lines.

parameters.name: expand
parameters.description: This parameter allows for expanding on some information. Currently only one option is available: attachments.

parameters.name: base_status
parameters.description: Invoice base status. Possible values are ACTIVE, CLOSED. All by default.

parameters.name: invoice_workflow_status
parameters.description: Invoice workflow status. Possible codes are listed in 'InvoiceStatus' [code table](https://developers.exlibrisgroup.com/blog/Working-with-the-code-tables-API). All by default.

parameters.name: owner
parameters.description: Invoice owner. Can be the institution code or a library code. See [Get libraries API](https://developers.exlibrisgroup.com/alma/apis/conf/GET/gwPcGly021p29HpB7XTI4Dp4I8TKv6CAxBlD4LyRaVE=/37088dc9-c685-4641-bc7f-60b5ca7cabed). All by default.

parameters.name: creation_form
parameters.description: Invoice creation form. Possible codes are listed in 'InvoiceCreationForm' [code table](https://developers.exlibrisgroup.com/blog/Working-with-the-code-tables-API). All by default.

200.description: OK - This method returns an object based on rest_invoices.xsd. See [here](/alma/apis/docs/xsd/rest_invoices.xsd)

400.description:
Bad Request

402119 - 'General error.'

412400 - 'Invoice X not found.'

401873 - 'Request failed: X'

get.description: This API returns an invoice's attachment.

parameters.name: invoice_id
parameters.description: The Invoice id.

parameters.name: attachment_id
parameters.description: The Attachment id.

parameters.name: expand
parameters.description: The expand parameter. Optional. Default value: content.

200.description: OK - This method returns an object based on rest_attachment.xsd. See [here](/alma/apis/docs/xsd/rest_attachment.xsd)

400.description:
Bad Request

60100 - 'The parameter X must be a number greater than zero.'

402401 - 'Invoice X not found.'

60321 - 'Attachment X not found.'

60322 - 'Attachment content could not be processed.'

get.description: This API returns a specific Invoice.

parameters.name: invoice_id
parameters.description: The Invoice id.

parameters.name: view
parameters.description: Invoice view. If view=brief, invoices will be returned without lines.

parameters.name: expand
parameters.description: This parameter allows for expanding on some information. Currently only one option is available: attachments.

200.description: OK - This method returns an object based on rest_invoice.xsd. See [here](/alma/apis/docs/xsd/rest_invoice.xsd)

400.description:
Bad Request

402119 - 'General error.'

412400 - 'Invoice X not found.'

402459 - 'Error while trying to retrieve invoice X.'

60100 - 'The parameter X must be a number greater than zero.'

post.description:
This API operates on an invoice.

It is possible to use this API to process an invoice - see blog: [Creating an invoice using APIs](https://developers.exlibrisgroup.com/blog/Creating-an-invoice-using-APIs). 

It is also possible to use this API for invoice integration with ERP system - see blog [Alma - ERP invoices integration using APIs](https://developers.exlibrisgroup.com/blog/Alma-ERP-invoices-integration-using-APIs).

parameters.name: invoice_id
parameters.description: The Invoice id.

parameters.name: op
parameters.description: The operation to perform on the invoice. Currently, the options are 'mark_in_erp', 'paid', 'process_invoice' or 'rejected'

parameters.name: create_rt_invoice
parameters.description: Indication whether to create _RT invoice for VAT management.

requestBody.description: This method takes an invoice object. See [here](/alma/apis/docs/xsd/rest_invoice.xsd?tags=POST)

200.description: OK - This method returns an object based on rest_invoice.xsd. See [here](/alma/apis/docs/xsd/rest_invoice.xsd)

400.description:
Bad Request

40166410 - 'Parameter op is not valid.'

412400 - 'Invoice X not found.'

60260 - 'Failed to start invoice process and workflow.'

60267 - 'Failed to process invoice in ERP.'

60268 - 'The invoice note is mandatory.'

parameters.name: invoice_id
parameters.description: The Invoice id.

requestBody.description: This method takes an invoice object. See [here](/alma/apis/docs/xsd/rest_invoice.xsd?tags=PUT)

200.description: OK - This method returns an object based on rest_invoice.xsd. See [here](/alma/apis/docs/xsd/rest_invoice.xsd)

400.description:

60234 - 'Invoice date not in payload.'

60235 - 'Invoice total amount not in payload.'

60236 - 'Invoice currency not valid.'

60237 - 'Invoice vendor account not valid.'

60238 - 'Invoice payment method not valid.'

60239 - 'Invoice status not valid.'

60240 - 'Invoice prepaid not valid.'

60241 - 'Invoice explicit ratio not valid.'

60242 - 'Invoice vendor not material supplier.'

60243 - 'Invoice vendor currency not supported.'

60244 - 'Invoice explicit ratio duplicate currency.'

60245 - 'Invoice payment status not valid.'

60246 - 'Invoice owner not valid.'

60252 - 'Invoice vat percentage or amount allowed but not both.'

60253 - 'Invoice vat code not valid.'

4028805 - 'Invoice vendor not in payload.'

60291 - 'Invoice update not allowed due to status.'

60256 - 'Invoice not updated.'

get.description: This API returns a specific Invoice's lines.

parameters.name: invoice_id
parameters.description: The Invoice id.

parameters.name: q
parameters.description: Search query. Optional. Searching for fields: invoice_line_number. Example (note the tilde between the code and text): q=invoice_line_number~101 (see [Brief Search](https://developers.exlibrisgroup.com/blog/How-we-re-building-APIs-at-Ex-Libris#BriefSearch))

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Limits the number of results. Optional. Valid values are 0-100. Default value: 10.

parameters.name: offset
parameters.description: Offset of the results returned. Optional. Default value: 0, which means that the first results will be returned.

200.description: OK - This method returns an object based on rest_invoice_lines.xsd. See [here](/alma/apis/docs/xsd/rest_invoice_lines.xsd)

400.description:
Bad Request

402119 - 'General error.'

412400 - 'Invoice X not found.'

402459 - 'Error while trying to retrieve invoice X.'

60100 - 'The parameter X must be a number greater than zero.'

401873 - 'The search query parameter is not valid.'

post.description: This Web Service creates a license.

requestBody.description: This method takes a License object. See [here](/alma/apis/docs/xsd/rest_license.xsd?tags=POST)

200.description: OK - This method returns an object based on rest_license.xsd. See [here](/alma/apis/docs/xsd/rest_license.xsd)

400.description:
Bad Request

60186 - 'License name is required.'

60187 - 'License type is not valid.'

60188 - 'License status is not valid.'

60189 - 'License review status is not valid.'

60190 - 'License licensor is not valid.'

60191 - 'License XXX date is not valid.'

60192 - 'License location is not valid.'

60193 - 'License agent is not valid.'

60194 - 'License terms are not valid.'

60195 - 'License terms and types are not valid.'

60196 - 'License not created.'

60197 - 'License code required.'

60198 - 'License code not unique.'

60201 - 'License end date before start date.'

60220 - 'License administrator is not valid.'

get.description:
This API returns a list of licenses. 

Templates and deleted licenses are not included.

parameters.name: q
parameters.description: Search query. Optional. Searched fields: name, code, licensor. (see [Brief Search](https://developers.exlibrisgroup.com/blog/How-we-re-building-APIs-at-Ex-Libris#BriefSearch))

parameters.name: status
parameters.description: License status. Optional. Valid values are ACTIVE, DELETED, DRAFT, EXPIRED, RETIRED, ALL. Unless specified, deleted records are excluded.

parameters.name: type
parameters.description: License type. Optional. Valid values are LICENSE, NEGOTIATION, ADDENDUM, ALL. Default: LICENSE

parameters.name: review_status
parameters.description: License review status. Optional. Valid values are ALL, and the listed values in LicenseReviewStatuses code table. Default: ALL

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Limits the number of results. Optional. Valid values are 0-100. Default value: 10.

parameters.name: offset
parameters.description: Offset of the results returned. Optional. Default value: 0, which means that the first results will be returned.

parameters.name: expand
parameters.description: This parameter allows for expanding on some information. Currently only one option is available: attachments.

parameters.name: create_date_from
parameters.description: Retrieve licenses with create date after this Date (YYYY-MM-DD). Optional.

parameters.name: create_date_to
parameters.description: Retrieve licenses with create date before this Date (YYYY-MM-DD). Optional.

parameters.name: modify_date_from
parameters.description: Retrieve licenses with modify date after this Date (YYYY-MM-DD). Optional.

parameters.name: modify_date_to
parameters.description: Retrieve licenses with modify date before this Date (YYYY-MM-DD). Optional.

200.description: OK - This method returns an object based on rest_licenses.xsd. See [here](/alma/apis/docs/xsd/rest_licenses.xsd)

400.description:
Bad Request

402119 - 'General error.'

40166411 - 'Param value is invalid.'

40166404 - 'Given field X has invalid value Y, please use one of the valid values listed under the Z code table.'

401873 - 'Request failed: X'

parameters.name: permanent_delete

get.description: This API returns a list of PO-Lines.

parameters.name: q
parameters.description: Search query. Optional. Searching for words from: title, author, mms_id, publisher, publication_year, publication_place, issn_isbn, shelving_location, vendor_code, vendor_name, vendor_account, fund_code, fund_name, number, po_number, invoice_reference & all (for searching in all the above fields). It is also possible to search on fields from the related items (relevant for libraries who have one PO-Line per Item, and the maximum number of records which can be retrieved is limited): enumeration_a/b/c, chronology_i/j/k, item_description and item_library. Example (note the tilde between the code and text): q=author~Mark (see [Brief Search](https://developers.exlibrisgroup.com/blog/How-we-re-building-APIs-at-Ex-Libris#BriefSearch))

parameters.name: status
parameters.description: PO-Line Status. Optional. Valid values are CLOSED, CANCELLED, ACTIVE, ALL, ALL_WITH_CLOSED. Default: ALL (retrieves all PO lines except CLOSED).

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Limits the number of results. Optional. Valid values are 0-100. Default value: 10.

parameters.name: offset
parameters.description: Offset of the results returned. Optional. Default value: 0, which means that the first results will be returned.

parameters.name: order_by
parameters.description: Order by parameter. Optional. The default is title. The Order by options are number, title, created_date and po_number. It is also possible to sort by fields from the related items (relevant for libraries who have one PO-Line per Item, and only works when the search query included item related fields): enumeration_a/b/c, chronology_i/j/k & item_description. The secondary sort is on number.

parameters.name: direction
parameters.description: Direction of ordering. Optional. The choices are asc, desc. The default is desc.

parameters.name: acquisition_method
parameters.description: Filter by acquisition method, e.g. PURCHASE. Optional. The default is to do no filtering.

parameters.name: expand
parameters.description:
The expand parameter allows for increasing the PO-Lines information with data on:

notes - The PO notes.

locations - The PO locations with their sub objects.

To get more than one, use a comma separator. Optional.

parameters.name: library
parameters.description: The code of the library that owns the PO lines. Optional. If supplied, only the PO Lines for this library will be retrieved. If not supplied, all the PO Lines that match the other parameters will be retrieved.

parameters.name: min_expected_arrival_date
parameters.description: Retrieve PO lines with expected arrival date starting this Date (YYYY-MM-DD). Optional.

parameters.name: max_expected_arrival_date
parameters.description: Retrieve PO lines with expected arrival date until this Date (YYYY-MM-DD), included. Optional.

200.description: OK - This method returns an object based on rest_po_lines.xsd. See [here](/alma/apis/docs/xsd/rest_po_lines.xsd)

400.description:
Bad Request

402119 - 'General error.'

40188600 - 'Search query parameter X is not supported.'

40188602 - 'Results cannot be sorted by item attribute without providing at least one condition for item search.'

40188603 - 'Results can be sorted by one or more item attributes OR one Poline attribute.'

40188604 - 'order_by value X is invalid. Valid sort values are: [list of valid sort values].'

40188605 - 'The provided search query returns more than X items. Please narrow your search.'

post.description:
This web service creates a new PO-Line. 



The PO line can be for physical, electronic or electronic collection. The PO line will be created along with the relevant inventory according to the 'type' field. It will then be processed in Alma as any PO line. 



The common use case for this web service is for creating a PO line in Alma, representing an order that was purchased at vendor system. See details [here](https://developers.exlibrisgroup.com/blog/Real-time-Acquisitions). 

The following fields are required by the POST action: owner, type, title or mms_id. If they were not supplied - 400 HTTP error will be returned. There are other fields which are required for the PO line to be processed in Alma: vendor, vendor account, price and fund. If any of these fields is missing, the PO Line will be created in Alma, but will be in the 'In Review' list. 



Note that PO line processing in Alma is asynchronous. This means that the response for POST action might not include status and alerts. As part of the PO line details, the relevant metadata is sent to Alma. Alma will try to match it with existing bibliographic records. If a matching bibliographic record exists- the new PO line will be related to that record. If not, a new bibliographic record will be created including the relevant metadata. 



For more information about configuring match rules see [here](https://developers.exlibrisgroup.com/blog/Create-PO-line-API-how-the-bibliographic-record-is-determined).

parameters.name: profile_code
parameters.description: New Order API profile code. Optional. If multiple profiles exist and no profile parameter is passed in the querystring, the default profile is used.

parameters.name: requires_manual_review
parameters.description: Requires manual review. Optional.

requestBody.description: This method creates a PO Line object. See [here](/alma/apis/docs/xsd/rest_po_line.xsd?tags=POST)

200.description: OK - This method returns an object based on rest_po_line.xsd. See [here](/alma/apis/docs/xsd/rest_po_line.xsd)

400.description:
Bad Request

402119 - 'General error.'

401870 - 'PoLine X already exists.'

401664 - 'Mandatory field is missing: X'

60320 - 'No charge is not allowed for this PO line configuration.'

401872 - 'Given X is illegal.'

delete.description: This web service cancels a PO-Line.

parameters.name: po_line_id
parameters.description: The PO-Line number.

parameters.name: reason
parameters.description: The cancellation reason code. From the 'PO Line Cancellation Reasons' code table.

parameters.name: comment
parameters.description: Comment regarding cancellation.

parameters.name: inform_vendor
parameters.description: Inform vendor of cancellation flag. Defaults to false.

parameters.name: override
parameters.description: Override errors flag. Defaults to false.

parameters.name: bib
parameters.description: Method for handling standalone Bib record: retain, delete or suppress. Optional. By default: retain.

400.description:
Bad Request

402119 - 'General error.'

401884 - 'PO Line already cancelled.'

401881 - 'Failed to cancel the PO Line. (With error message)'

401874 - 'Failed to cancel the PO Line.'

401871 - 'Po-Line X not found.'

put.description:
This web service updates a PO-Line. The PO line can be for physical, electronic or electronic collection.

Note: if the locations section includes a copy in a temporary location, the entire locations section will not be updated.

parameters.name: po_line_id
parameters.description: The PO-Line number.

parameters.name: update_inventory
parameters.description: Flag for updating the PO Line's inventory. Options: true, false. Default: true.

parameters.name: redistribute_funds
parameters.description: Indication if the total amount will be distributed. Optional. Default is False. When true - the API will ignore funding information in the payload and calculate funding based on existing funds.

requestBody.description: This method creates a PO Line object. See [here](/alma/apis/docs/xsd/rest_po_line.xsd?tags=PUT)

200.description: OK - This method returns an object based on rest_po_line.xsd. See [here](/alma/apis/docs/xsd/rest_po_line.xsd)

400.description:
Bad Request

401676 - 'Request body not found.'

401871 - 'PO Line not found.'

60320 - 'No charge is not allowed for this PO line configuration.'

401876 - 'Failed to update PO Line (with error message).'

post.description: This web service adds an item to a PO-Line and receives it.

parameters.name: department
parameters.description: The code of the department where the item is being received. If not supplied, a random department will be chosen from the owning library's acquisition departments.

post.description: This web service updates an item to be considered received. If no payload is sent, the item information will not be changed besides the receive action. If an item object is sent in the payload, the item information will be updated accordingly.

parameters.name: po_line_id
parameters.description: The PO-Line number.

parameters.name: item_id
parameters.description: The item ID.

parameters.name: op
parameters.description: The operation to perform on the item. Currently, the only option is 'receive'

parameters.name: receive_date
parameters.description: The receive date. Default value is current time.  Expected Format: YYYY-MM-DDZ

parameters.name: department
parameters.description: The code of the department where the item is being received. If not supplied, a random department will be chosen from the owning library's acquisition departments.

parameters.name: department_library
parameters.description: The library code of the department where the item is being received.

requestBody.description: The item info for updating the item. If no update is required, an empty item object must be sent (e.g. <item />). See [here](/alma/apis/docs/xsd/rest_item.xsd?tags=POST)

200.description: OK - This method returns an object based on rest_item.xsd. See [here](/alma/apis/docs/xsd/rest_item.xsd)

400.description:
Bad Request

40166411 - 'Param value is invalid.'

401875 - 'Failed to find the department.'

401871 - 'Failed to find the PO Line.'

401877 - 'Failed to receive PO Line (with error message).'
